name: 本·科西莫雷

last_movies.title: 海贼王(真人版) 第一季
古战场传奇 第三季

introduction: REBAONE BEN KGOSIMORERebaone Kgosimore is an actor, singer, and dancer from Johannesburg, South Africa. He has a BA in Dramatic Arts from the University of the Witwatersrand majoring in Performance Studies and Writing. His theatre credits include: The Adventures of Oliver Twist as Bill Sykes, Shakespeare's Antony and Cleopatra as Marc Antony, and Janice Honeymann's The Adventures of Pinocchio as Lampwick. On television he has appeared in the History Channel's Roots (2015 remake) as Kalabi Koro, South African channel SABC 1's Generations: The Legacy as Paul Moroka and Netflix's live-action remake of the anime One Piece as the original Mr 7.
